prereg_rules: freeze SM null and COG alternative model forms

tests.title: CP topology conditioning in heavy flavor
tests.sm_null: CKM-driven smooth asymmetry pattern after known systematics
tests.cog_prediction: class-conditioned asymmetry offsets correlated with motif decoherence class
tests.primary_statistic: out-of-sample delta_log_likelihood for preregistered COG class term
tests.pass_criterion: significant stable gain over SM baseline under prereg robustness checks
tests.falsification: no gain or unstable sign under prereg checks

tests.title: Running-coupling shape reanalysis
tests.cog_prediction: piecewise or staircase effective running in preregistered windows
tests.primary_statistic: AIC/BIC delta between smooth and prereg staircase models
tests.pass_criterion: staircase wins with prereg penalties and CV stability

tests.title: Sidereal anisotropy residual search
tests.cog_prediction: small harmonic modulation from residual axis anisotropy leakage
tests.pass_criterion: nonzero prereg amplitude with stable phase across independent runs

tests.title: EDM regime-conditioned map
tests.primary_statistic: bounded effect-size inference in prereg regime bins
tests.falsification: all channels null-compatible at prereg sensitivity

tests.title: Neutrino waveform-shape deformation
tests.sm_null: PMNS sinusoidal form with standard matter effects
tests.primary_statistic: likelihood ratio for fixed deformation basis

tests.title: Proton-decay channel hierarchy bias
tests.sm_null: no observed proton decay or model-dependent BSM channel expectations
tests.cog_prediction: channel ranking from motif-break pathway combinatorics
tests.pass_criterion: concordant observed ranking if signal exists

tests.title: Regime-dependent strong-CP map
tests.cog_prediction: near-zero in coherent domains and nonzero in specific decohered classes
tests.pass_criterion: stable class map across independent analyses

tests.title: Quantized transport plateaus
tests.cog_prediction: rational plateau families in motif-stable regimes
tests.primary_statistic: plateau occupancy significance versus smooth model
tests.pass_criterion: significant plateau structure in prereg windows
tests.falsification: smooth model sufficient under prereg thresholds
